title: Migration Eval Gold Anchor Entry
description: Schema for a single human-adjudicated label in the migration-eval gold anchor set (PRD M4-lite). Entries are stored as a JSON array; this schema validates one element of that array. See docs/migration_eval/gold_anchor.md for scope and re-anchoring cadence.

human_verdict.description: Reviewer verdict on the migration diff/outcome.

reviewer_notes.description: Free-form reviewer commentary explaining the verdict.

labeled_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the label was recorded.
